title: updatePrice Metadata Schema
description: Schema for validating metadata in updatePrice(string,uint256,uint256) messages

reason.description: The reason for this message, must be 'price_update'

price_scaled.description: Price scaled by 10^18, as a string to preserve precision

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the price observation

sources_count.description: Number of data sources that were aggregated (optional)

price_diff_bps.description: Price difference across sources in basis points (optional)
